sub_metric: Internal AI tool adoption rate (e.g. Rovo)
description: Share of relevant staff actively using Atlassian's AI tooling (e.g. Rovo) internally — a leading indicator Atlassian evaluates for AI-forward partners.
Number of customer engagements this quarter that specifically involved AI capability (Rovo, AI-powered workflows, etc.).
Staff certifications completed in Atlassian's AI-related enablement tracks.
